管理平台级角色，包括创建、编辑、启用/禁用、权限分配和成员管理: Manage platform roles including create, edit, enable/disable, permission assignment, and member management
角色编码仅允许字母、数字、下划线和连字符: Role code can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens
平台角色管理用于管理系统级角色定义。支持创建、编辑、删除角色，以及启用/禁用状态: Platform role management is used to manage system-level role definitions. Supports creating, editing, deleting roles, as well as enable/disable status switching, permission assignment and member management.
角色唯一标识，创建后不可修改，仅允许字母、数字、下划线和连字符: Unique role identifier, cannot be modified after creation, only letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens allowed
角色显示名称，用于界面展示: Role display name for UI presentation
已启用/已禁用，禁用后角色权限不生效: Enabled/Disabled, permissions will not take effect when disabled
创建新角色并分配对应权限: Create a new role and assign corresponding permissions
为角色添加或移除成员用户: Add or remove member users for the role
启用或禁用角色以控制权限生效范围: Enable or disable roles to control permission scope
step_search_role: Enter keywords or select status in the search area, click 'Search' to filter roles
step_create_role: Click 'Create' button, fill in role code, name and description, then submit
step_edit_role: Click 'Edit' button in the role list, modify role name or description and save
step_status_role: Click 'Enable' or 'Disable' in 'More' menu to toggle role status
step_assign_perm: Click 'Assign Permissions' in 'More' menu, check permissions in the tree and save
step_assign_member: Click 'Assign Members' in 'More' menu, select users and save
step_delete_role: Click 'Delete' in 'More' menu, confirm to delete the role (roles with associated users cannot be deleted)
